title: Justzilla's Classic Pack
description: The classic look of Minecraft... continued! Justzilla's Classic Pack aims to bring back the nostalgic feel of the original Minecraft textures with all blocks added since 1.14! So what are you waiting for? Reject Modernity, Embrace Tradition!
body:
The classic look of Minecraft... continued! Justzilla's Classic Pack aims to bring back the nostalgic feel of the original Minecraft textures with all blocks added since 1.14! So what are you waiting for? Reject Modernity, Embrace Tradition!

Rebranded from Justamedomz's Classic Pack.
